title: The hypothetical game
setting: Friends are passing time with hypothetical questions. The skill: the past subjunctive and conditional, used smoothly.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Si pudieras vivir en cualquier época, ¿cuál sería?
steps.en: If you could live in any era, which would it be?

options.es: Si pudiera, escogería los años sesenta.
options.en: If I could, I'd choose the sixties.
options.feedback: Past subjunctive + conditional, paired perfectly ('pudiera' / 'escogería'). Flawless.
Answers it, but skips the grammar the game is built on. Frame it with 'si pudiera...'
Present tense breaks the hypothetical. This needs the conditional: 'viviría' or 'escogería'.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: ¡Buena! ¿Y si tuvieras que renunciar a un sentido?
steps.en: Nice! And if you had to give up one sense?

options.es: Si tuviera que hacerlo, renunciaría al olfato.
options.en: If I had to, I'd give up smell.
options.feedback: 'Si tuviera... renunciaría' — textbook-perfect hypothetical, delivered naturally.

options.en: I'd give up smell, I think.
options.feedback: Clean conditional with a natural hedge ('creo'). Works beautifully.

options.en: I don't want to give up anything.
options.feedback: Dodges the game — fine once, but the fun is in playing along with the hypothetical.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Jajaja. ¿Y si no hubieras venido a Nicaragua?
steps.en: Hahaha. And if you hadn't come to Nicaragua?

options.es: Si no hubiera venido, no sería quien soy hoy.
options.en: If I hadn't come, I wouldn't be who I am today.
options.feedback: Pluperfect subjunctive + conditional ('hubiera venido' / 'sería') — advanced and elegant.

options.es: Mi vida habría sido muy diferente.
options.en: My life would have been very different.
options.feedback: Conditional perfect ('habría sido') — sophisticated and exactly right.

options.en: I didn't come, but here I am.
options.feedback: Contradicts itself and drops the hypothetical. Use 'si no hubiera venido...'

options.es: Vos preguntaste, yo solo respondí con el alma.
options.en: You asked, I just answered from the soul.
options.feedback: Playful yet sincere — a graceful register blend between the game and real feeling.

options.es: Es que tus preguntas dan para pensar.
options.en: It's that your questions give a lot to think about.
options.feedback: Natural and warm — turns the compliment back nicely.
No need to apologize for depth! Own the thoughtful moment.
